steps.title: Clear fractions
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $96cx$ to remove denominators: $$96=cx^{2}+96x \implies cx^{2}+96x-96=0.$$

steps.title: Apply the one-solution condition
steps.content: For exactly one solution, the discriminant is $0$: $96^{2}-4(c)(-96)=0$, so $9216+384c=0$ and $c=-24$. The answer is -24.
